verse.name: v1
verse.lines: To Jesus ev'ry day I find my heart is closer drawn; He's fairer than the glory of the gold and purple dawn; He's all my fancy pictures in its fairest dreams, and more Each day He grows still sweeter than He was the day before.

verse.name: v2
verse.lines: The half cannot be fancied this side the golden shore; Oh, there He'll be still sweeter than He ever was before.

verse.name: v3
v4
